requirements.summary: Restore all frontend source files to their exact Version 145 (live) state
acceptanceCriteria: All frontend pages render identically to the live Version 145 site
All routes defined in App.tsx match the live version exactly
Layout, header, footer, and navigation are identical to the live version
All page content (text, structure, components) matches Version 145
Calendly integration and all third-party scripts are configured identically to the live version
Tailwind theme tokens and CSS custom properties match the live version exactly
No empty or stub files remain where the live version has actual content

file_operations.description: Restore router configuration to Version 145 state, ensuring all routes (HomePage, AboutPage, CouplesPage, MenPage, WomenPage, PricingPage, ContactPage, LegalPage, BaselCouplesLandingPage, ZurichCouplesLandingPage) are defined exactly as in the live version
Restore HomePage to Version 145 state with hero section, services grid (couples, men, women coaching), and coach approach sections matching live content exactly
Restore AboutPage to Version 145 state with Roland Soder's bio, qualifications, core values, and CTA matching live content exactly
Restore CouplesPage to Version 145 state with benefits, target audience, coaching process steps, hero image, and CTA matching live content exactly
Restore MenPage to Version 145 state with hero section, coaching topics grid (identity, emotions, communication), working-style section, and CTA matching live content exactly
Restore WomenPage to Version 145 state with hero section, coaching topics grid (self-worth, boundary-setting, emotional intelligence), working-style section, and CTA matching live content exactly
Restore PricingPage to Version 145 state with service cards (free intro call, 190 CHF session), four-step booking process, and FAQ accordion matching live content exactly
Restore ContactPage to Version 145 state with contact cards, step-by-step booking process, FAQs, and embedded Calendly widget matching live content exactly
Restore LegalPage to Version 145 state with tabbed navigation (Impressum, Datenschutz, AGB) and all static legal text matching live content exactly

Restore BaselCouplesLandingPage to Version 145 state with SEO-targeted hero, benefits grid, target audience list, and inline Calendly widget matching live content exactly. Reference the generated image at frontend/public/assets/generated/basel-hero.dim_1200x600.jpg as a static asset
Restore ZurichCouplesLandingPage to Version 145 state with hero video section, benefits grid, and embedded Calendly widget matching live content exactly
Restore Layout component to Version 145 state with sticky header, desktop and mobile navigation, scroll-to-top on route changes, and footer with Basel headquarters info matching live version exactly

Restore CalendlyInlineWidget component to Version 145 state, ensuring it dynamically loads and initializes the Calendly inline booking widget for roland-soder/kennenlernen exactly as in the live version
Restore useCalendlyScript hook to Version 145 state, ensuring it lazily loads Calendly CSS and JS assets exactly as in the live version
Restore useQueries hook to Version 145 state with useGetAllPricingEntries React Query hook matching live version exactly
Restore global CSS to Version 145 state with Tailwind directives and light/dark theme CSS custom properties using the exact oklch color palette from the live version
Restore Tailwind configuration to Version 145 state with custom color tokens (oklch/hsl CSS variables), border radius, font family, and plugins matching live version exactly
Restore HTML entry point to Version 145 state with German locale, SEO and Open Graph meta tags referencing Basel, and Plausible Analytics integration for www.paarweg.com matching live version exactly
Restore sitemap.xml to Version 145 state listing all public pages with URLs, change frequencies, and priority values matching live version exactly
Restore IC assets configuration to Version 145 state ensuring .well-known directory CORS headers match live version exactly
Restore TypeScript declaration file to Version 145 state with Calendly widget API methods on Window interface matching live version exactly
Restore or remove this file to match Version 145 state. If the live version contains actual content, restore it exactly; if it's intentionally empty in live, leave it empty
